title: Kalshi traders say Strait of Hormuz traffic won't return to normal before January
summary_full: Two weeks ago traders on Kalshi saw a 60% chance that the Strait of Hormuz would open before August. Now traders see a higher chance it won't open before 2027.
summary_public: Two weeks ago traders on Kalshi saw a 60% chance that the Strait of Hormuz would open before August. Now traders see a higher chance it won't open before 2027.
